title: GenomeLens 直系同源目录
description: 用于整理双物种之间的高可信直系同源关系。该子模块会在同源搜索与共线性约束基础上输出可检索的直系同源目录，适合做基因功能对照、候选基因跨物种映射和保守基因集整理。
description_en: Used to derive high-confidence ortholog relationships between two species. This submodule combines homology search with synteny constraints to produce a searchable ortholog catalog for functional comparison, cross-species candidate-gene mapping, and conserved gene set curation.
context: 双物种直系同源整理与功能映射入口。
context_en: Entry point for pairwise ortholog curation and functional mapping.

params.label: 输入目录
params.description: 输入两个物种的原始文件目录。插件会自动识别同名前缀文件对，并据此建立直系同源目录所需的双物种输入。
params.description_en: Directory containing the raw files for two species. The plugin auto-discovers same-stem pairs and uses them to build the pairwise input required for ortholog catalog generation.

params.label: 输出目录
params.description: 直系同源目录输出位置。这里通常会保存可检索的同源配对结果及相关中间文件。
params.description_en: Output location for the ortholog catalog. This usually stores searchable ortholog pairing results together with related intermediate files.

params.label: 比对后端
params.description: 直系同源识别所依赖的同源搜索后端，会影响候选同源匹配的灵敏度与数量。
params.description_en: Homology search backend used for ortholog discovery. It influences the sensitivity and number of candidate homologous matches.

params.label: 序列类型
params.description: 用于直系同源识别的序列类型：核酸或蛋白。不同选择会影响匹配策略与最终同源集合。
params.description_en: Sequence type used for ortholog discovery: nucleotide or protein. Different choices affect the matching strategy and the resulting homolog set.

params.label: 同源匹配过滤强度
params.description: 控制进入直系同源目录的匹配严格程度。阈值越高，保留下来的配对通常越可信。
params.description_en: Controls how strict the filtering is for matches entering the ortholog catalog. Higher thresholds usually retain more reliable pairs.

params.label: 共线性锚点最大基因距离
params.description: 定义在共线性约束下可接受的锚点最大间隔，从而影响哪些同源关系能被视为稳定的直系同源背景。
params.description_en: Defines the maximum anchor spacing accepted under synteny constraints, influencing which homologous relationships can be treated as occurring in a stable orthologous context.

params.label: Block 过滤迭代次数
params.description: 控制共线性背景清理的迭代次数，从而间接影响直系同源目录的保守程度。
params.description_en: Controls how many rounds of synteny-context cleanup are performed, indirectly affecting how conservative the ortholog catalog becomes.

params.label: 最小共线性区块大小
params.description: 保留支撑直系同源判断的最小区块大小。更高的值通常意味着更严格的共线性支持。
params.description_en: Minimum block size required to support ortholog calling. Higher values usually imply stricter syntenic support.

params.label: 线程数
params.description: 该流程可用的并行线程数，主要影响前期同源搜索速度。
params.description_en: Number of parallel threads available to this workflow, mainly affecting the speed of the upstream homology search.
